title: Pitch Shifter
description: Pitch Shifter Is An Addon For Simple Voice Chat, Allowing For The Pitch And Other Things Of Your Voice To Be Changed! It functions as a Simple Voice Chat Voice Changer!
body:
# Pitch Shifter
Pitch shifter is a mod which adds a special functionality to [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)!
Pitch shifter allows for the feature of changing how **your** voice sounds to other players!

Press "P" to open the In-Game Hud!

Heres How The GUI Looks:
![Provided Image On How The GUI Looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f5fcedd94bcee71bdcfb9d6a6fed26d203fc350_0.webp)
